creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2011-02-03 09:01:18 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils             Makefile 
  Added files:
    sysutils/froxlor     Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    sysutils/froxlor/files pkg-deinstall.in pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  Froxlor is an ISP Server Management Panel written in PHP, allowing customers
  to manage their own domains, DNS entries, email addresses, ftp accounts and
  more.
  
  WWW:    http://www.froxlor.org/
  
  PR:             ports/154426
  Submitted by:   Marco Steinbach <coco at executive-computing.de>
  Feature safe:   yes
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1270    +1 -0      ports/sysutils/Makefile
  1.1       +86 -0     ports/sysutils/froxlor/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/sysutils/froxlor/distinfo (new)

  1.1       +14 -0     ports/sysutils/froxlor/files/pkg-message.in (new)
